base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_aim_up — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Aim-up pose — arm-cannon pointed straight up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Aim-up pose — arm-cannon pointed straight up; used when pressing Up while shooting
